overall.description: A third-person game engine sequence showing a character running through a misty mountainous landscape. The character traverses rocky terrain with large cliff formations, approaching and then running along the cliff edge under a hazy sky with atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge approaching cliff face

events.description: birds fly overhead in the hazy sky
character slows slightly as approaching the cliff wall

agents.ego_description: running steadily across rocky terrain toward the distant cliff formations

notable_agents.action: birds flying in the sky above the mountains

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain range visible through the atmospheric haze
massive vertical cliff face with layered rock strata and weathered surfaces
uneven rocky ground with sparse grass patches and loose stones
misty haze filling the valley between mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: The character runs across an open mountain ridge with expansive views of distant snow-capped peaks. Birds fly overhead in the hazy sky as the character approaches a massive rocky cliff formation ahead. The terrain is uneven with sparse vegetation and loose rocks underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path with vertical rock wall on right

events.description: character turns left to run parallel along the cliff edge
path narrows between large rock outcroppings

agents.ego_description: turning left to traverse along the base of the cliff face, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: dark cave entrance visible in the rock wall face
steep cliff edge dropping into misty valley below

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to run along the cliff edge, with the massive rock wall now directly to the right. A dark cave opening becomes visible in the cliff face. The path narrows as the character moves between rock outcroppings, with a steep drop visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain ledge with steep valley on left

events.description: sun flare becomes visible through the haze as camera faces the light

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the narrow cliff edge path with the wall on the right

entered.detail: deep misty valley with layered mountain ridges visible to the left
rocky overhang extending from the cliff wall above the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the narrow mountain ledge with the steep valley visible to the left. Sun flare appears through the haze ahead. The path runs beneath a rocky overhang on the right, with atmospheric fog filling the distant valleys.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an open mountain ridge that gradually narrows into a precarious cliffside path. It begins with the character running across uneven terrain and sparse vegetation, moving toward a massive rocky formation while birds fly through a hazy sky filled with distant snow-capped peaks. As the character turns left, the expansive view shifts to a towering rock wall on the right, passing a dark cave opening as the path tightens between jagged outcroppings. The scene then transitions onto a narrow ledge overlooking a steep valley, where the camera moves beneath a rocky overhang. Finally, the movement continues forward as a bright sun flare pierces through the atmospheric fog filling the distant depths.
